input: Run state management design on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected state management design output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the state management design workflow

input: Apply state management design to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive state management design analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to state management design
